---
title: "Associations between dietary variety, portion size and body weight: Prospective evidence from UK Biobank participants"
authors: "Embling, R., Price, M. J., Lee, M. D., Jones, A. L., & Wilkinson, L. L."
year: 2023
date: 2023-01-01
pub-journal: "British Journal of Nutrition"
volume: "1–11"
doi: "10.1017/S0007114523000156"
pdf: "assets/papers/2023/emblingetal2023.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
